arts.ttl: From Turkey: Newcastle United close to signing young forward – Could be completed in coming days
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Newcastle United are showing interest in Gençlerbirligi forward Baran Yıldız. It’s been common for Premier League sides to scout young talent in Turkey and there’s a possibility the 18-year-old could join the English club. Ankara media outlet Zafer Gazetesi say Newcastle United are looking to reach an The post From Turkey: Newcastle United close to signing young forward – Could be completed in coming days appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Club evaluating dramatic move for Fulham player – Last minute attempt is ambitious
arts.sum: Adama Traore has played over 1000 minutes in the Premier League for Fulham this season. While he has not been a regular starter, he has come off the bench and repeatedly been used as an impact substitute, scoring twice and racking up three assists for Marco Silva’s side. His future at Fulham could now be The post Club evaluating dramatic move for Fulham player – Last minute attempt is ambitious appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United chiefs give Eddie Howe clear transfer message after Miguel Almiron sale
arts.sum: Despite selling Miguel Almiron to Atlanta United for £11 million, Howe will not be handed the funds to lure in a new right winger this window but admitted it was a position on his shortlist moving forward. As Newcastle scour the free transfer market, with United talking to Malaga star Antonio Cordero's agent over a summer deal, Howe could not confirm that he would automatically be handed cash to spend in the summer window and that the Almiron deal had been forced on him due to the PSR rulebook.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United ‘first and foremost’ in tussle for player – Magpies well placed for 25-year-old
arts.sum: Newcastle United are yet to make any significant signings in the January transfer window. While they are active in the outgoings department, the Magpies can soon be ready to work on an incoming. The player in question is AC Milan’s Samuel Chukwueze, who scored a stoppage time winner for the Italian club in a victory The post Newcastle United ‘first and foremost’ in tussle for player – Magpies well placed for 25-year-old appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United "open talks" with Malaga teenager wanted by Real Madrid and Barcelona
arts.sum: Newcastle United are believed to have opened talks with Malaga youngster Antonio Cordero over a summer move. Cordero will be out of contract this summer with Newcastle understood to be eager to make a swoop.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United face deadline decision on striker after loan enquiries
arts.sum: The long-term concern for Osula is the lack of minutes because while the young Dane enjoyed a run out in the FA Cup against Bromley, when he netted his first Toon goal, his chances of action are slim. Howe says that Osula is doing the right things in training and added: "His best asset, as you saw from the goal against Bromley, is his pace and he can score.

arts.ttl: Shearer meets Isak - the 'world-class assassin' who is a 'manager's dream'
arts.sum: Newcastle legend Alan Shearer meets Magpies striker Alexander Isak to find out how his past shaped his style of play and what the future holds.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United see £100m training ground possibilities as 'world-class' plans formulated
arts.sum: It may be a few years before spades are in the ground but Newcastle United's key decision makers are plotting a new state-of-the-art training ground to help transport the Magpies to the next level. However, Howe - and the club - know the north east outfit need the very best infrastructure available to continue their growth on and off the pitch.

arts.ttl: Shearer meets Isak to talk goals, idols and dog memes
arts.sum: Alan Shearer interviews Newcastle striker Alexander Isak for Football Focus to discuss his goalscoring form and how he wants to be "good at everything".

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer fires 'how dare they' ticket blast as Newcastle weigh up price hike amid Man Utd row
arts.sum: The subject has become a hot topic among St James' Park matchgoers, with the Newcastle United Supporters Trust urging the club to 'buck the trend and make a statement' by freezing season ticket prices. Newcastle United legend Alan Shearer has fired a broadside at Manchester United's decision to hike season ticket prices at Old Trafford.
